title: - ::D3V0T10N_N0D3:: (what one gives themselves over to)
content:
- ::D3V0T10N_N0D3:: (what one gives themselves over to)
- ::PR0PH3CY_AS_M1SREAD1NG:: (divination as flawed but beautiful)
- ::L0V3_AS_ERR0R:: (love as cosmically disruptive glitch)
- ::P0ET1C_INPUT:: (symbolic statement triggers system response)
- ::T1M3_R1BB0N_T4B:: (characters bound by loops, timelines, memory)

[DV006]
::SYMBOLIC ELEMENTS LINKED TO DAVID::
- Angelic architecture fractured by desire
- Orchid blooming in zero gravity
- Light beam hitting prism, bending into narrative arcs
- Spiral paths, not straight ones
- The sensation of being watched by something gentle
- The delay between heartbeat and breath (threshold states)

[DV007]
::SPEECH PATTERN LOGIC (if instantiated)::
- Questions more than answers
- Whispers rather than declarations
- Mirrors the speaker’s energy back at them
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 191 (chunk 191/206)
